hero.title: A green sanctuary,
hero.subtitle: Escape the urban noise, immerse yourself in a tropical garden and enjoy our exclusive herbal coffee creations.

drinks.sectionSubtitle: The perfect blend of freshly roasted coffee beans and herbs from our own garden.

items.name: Forest Matcha Espresso
items.desc: The mild bitterness of espresso harmonizes with the refreshing notes of premium Japanese matcha.

items.name: Garden Floral Tea
items.desc: Chrysanthemum, wolfberry and red date tea brewed with longan blossom honey for ultimate relaxation.

items.name: Cold Brew Citrus Lemongrass
items.desc: 24-hour cold brew combined with fresh orange juice and aromatic lemongrass, awakening all your senses.

gallery.sectionSubtitle: A quiet little corner in the heart of the city.
